channel.title: Hacktoberfest on Notre Dame Linux Users Group
channel.description: Recent content in Hacktoberfest on Notre Dame Linux Users Group

item.title: LugCast: Hacktoberfest is Here!
item.description: LUG discusses getting involved in this year’s Hacktoberfest and the struggles of being a maintainer during Hacktoberfest.

item.title: HacktoberFest and Contributing to Open Source
item.description: In the midst of HacktoberFest, President Tim Burchfield (8bit) talks about contibuting to Open Source.
